findings.evidence: PR description says the work supports roadmap intention #33; `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/OneParameterSemigroups/README.md:178` states the Bernstein theorem milestone and `:185-186` calls for Prokhorov measure extraction, while `rg -n "roadmap|OneParameterSemigroups" code/TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/BernsteinAux.lean code/TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/BernsteinMeasures.lean code/TauCeti/MeasureTheory/Measure/Prokhorov.lean` has no hits.
findings.fix: Add a references/roadmap note in the affected module docs, especially the Bernstein and Prokhorov files, pointing to the OneParameterSemigroups Bernstein theorem milestone.
findings.issue: The new Bernstein/Prokhorov infrastructure follows roadmap intention #33, but the added module docs do not credit the OneParameterSemigroups roadmap blueprint.

summary: The external mathematical sources are credited, but the PR also follows the human roadmap blueprint named in the PR description without carrying that attribution into the new code docs.
